category_sources: source_facts.description says chess-playing program; GNU Chess page says it plays chess against a human or as an engine for graphical frontends.
display_name_sources: GNU Chess homepage and Savannah project summary use GNU Chess; source_facts.name is gnu-chess.
docs_sources: GNU Chess homepage links official online documentation; GNU Chess manual page documents version 6.3.0.
repo_sources: GNU Chess homepage points development sources to Savannah; Savannah summary lists a Git repository; FSF Directory lists the Savannah cgit VCS webview.
tags_sources: GNU Chess page describes terminal play and graphical frontends such as XBoard; manual and source_facts.executables identify command-line engine usage.
